State of California 
Memorandum 
To 
Michael Bennett, Executive Director 
Fair Political Practices Commission 
From 
: Secretary of State - D VID B. PITMAN, Manager 
Political Reform Division 
Subject: Letter Regardi ng Fi 1 i ng Duty 
The attached letter addressed to your office is returned. 
Attachment 
DBP:tf 
August 14, 1979 


California 
Young Democrats 
July 27, 1979 
State of California 
Fair Political Practices Commission 
P.O. Box 807 
Sacramento, CA 
95804 
To Whom It May Concern: 
6022 Wilshire Blvd 
los Angeles. CA 90036 
! 2131 931 Wil 
I talked with your office in Los Angeles yesterday about whether or not the Cali-
fornia Young Democrats fell into the category of having to file a Title 9 report. 
Since we do not make contributions to candidates, have not received donations or 
contributions in excess of $200.00 and only organize our membership for volunteer 
work they said it looked like we wouldn't need to file. 
We will however, be showing up on other people's Title 9 reports for the small 
contributions made to us from them. 
We want to fully comply with all regulations on this matter, so if there are any 
questions about the California Young Democrats or if a question arises about our 
filing a report, please let us know as soon as possible and we will be happy to 
provide the appropriate information. 
Sincerely yours, 
Carol S. Syverson 
Treasurer, California Young Democrats

sections.question_synthetic: Must the California Young Democrats file a Title 9 report given that they do not make contributions to candidates, have not received donations exceeding $200, and only organize membership for volunteer work?
sections.parsing_notes: Format: ocr; LLM: This is an incoming request letter, not an FPPC response. The document includes a transmittal memorandum from the Secretary of State's office forwarding the letter to the FPPC. No formal FPPC conclusion or advice is present in this document. OCR quality is poor in some sections, affecting confidence.

embedding.summary: This is an incoming letter from Carol S. Syverson, Treasurer of California Young Democrats, seeking clarification on whether their organization must file a Title 9 report under California political finance laws. The organization states it does not make candidate contributions, has not received donations over $200, and only organizes volunteer work.
